member.name: T:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent
member.summary: A software event is a generic event that can be used to track any event that occurs in the software.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.Name
member.summary: The name of the event.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: The timestamp of the event.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.TimestampSource
member.summary: The source of the timestamp. Typically either a harp device or on the visual render loop

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.FrameIndex
member.summary: The frame index of the event.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.FrameTimestamp
member.summary: The timestamp of the frame.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SoftwareEvent.Data
member.summary: The data payload of the event.

member.name: T:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SpoutRigPosition
member.summary: Dictionary of named absolute positions, e.g.: home, both_in, both_out

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SpoutRigPosition.Positions
member.summary: Named absolute positions of the lick spout stage stepper rig, keyed by a string identifier.

member.name: T:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions
member.summary: Absolute target position for the 5-axis spout rig, expressed in task-relative axes.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions.LeftElevation
member.summary: Left spout elevation axis absolute position (steps). Maps to motor 1

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions.RightElevation
member.summary: Right spout elevation axis absolute position (steps). Maps to motor 2

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions.RightRadial
member.summary: Right spout radial axis (in/out) absolute position (steps). Maps to motor 3

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions.LeftRadial
member.summary: Left spout radial axis (in/out) absolute position (steps). Maps to motor 4

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.StepperPositions.BaseTransverse
member.summary: Base transverse axis absolute position (steps). Maps to motor 5

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.Vector2.X
member.summary: X coordinate of the point.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.Vector2.Y
member.summary: Y coordinate of the point.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.Vector3.X
member.summary: X coordinate of the point.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.Vector3.Y
member.summary: Y coordinate of the point.

member.name: P:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.Vector3.Z
member.summary: Z coordinate of the point.

member.name: T:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.SerializeToJson
member.summary: Serializes a sequence of data model objects into JSON strings.

member.name: T:UclOpen.Core.DataTypes.DeserializeFromJson
member.summary: Deserializes a sequence of JSON strings into data model objects.
